testcase.name: shouldExportAndImportWithoutDescription

testcase.name: shouldExportAndImport
testcase.system-out: 13:41:16.757 [INFO ] com.novafx.export.NfxzExporter - Exported .nfxz to /tmp/junit-524688508662905039/test.nfxz (362 bytes) 13:41:16.772 [INFO ] com.novafx.export.NfxzExporter - Imported .nfxz from /tmp/junit-524688508662905039/test.nfxz: 'TestProject'

testcase.name: shouldHandleComplexFunctionDefinition
testcase.system-out: 13:41:16.776 [INFO ] com.novafx.export.NfxzExporter - Exported .nfxz to /tmp/junit-3265650573874494670/heart.nfxz (403 bytes) 13:41:16.777 [INFO ] com.novafx.export.NfxzExporter - Imported .nfxz from /tmp/junit-3265650573874494670/heart.nfxz: 'Heart'
